diagrams.title: Normalization Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Shows the progression from unnormalized to 1NF, 2NF, 3NF, and BCNF with what each eliminates
diagrams.purpose: Understand cumulative nature of normal forms

diagrams.title: Dependency Types in Normalization
diagrams.description: Visual representation of partial vs transitive dependencies in relation to candidate keys
elements: Partial Dependency Arrow: Key Part → Non-Prime
diagrams.purpose: Visualize what dependencies each normal form eliminates

diagrams.title: 2NF Decomposition Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process to decompose a relation with partial dependencies into 2NF
elements: Identify FDs from each key part
Separate attributes that depend on key parts

diagrams.title: 3NF Decomposition Process
diagrams.description: Step-by-step process to decompose a relation with transitive dependencies into 3NF
